description: You are a mastering engineer preparing a digital session for a 7-inch vinyl record pressing. In the Ardour session 'MyProject', sequence the audio files from /home/ga/Audio/ep_mixes/ (song1_intro.wav, song2_allegro.wav, song3_adagio.wav, song4_finale.wav) into two tracks named 'Side A' and 'Side B'. Both tracks must begin with exactly 1.0 second of silence, with exactly 2.0 seconds of silence between songs on the same side. Set the gain for both tracks to -3 dB and save the session.
